2026-06-15.title: Day 1 ❤️
2026-06-15.message: Happy beginning of our little forever project, Bandar.

2026-06-16.title: Day 2 🌸
2026-06-16.message: I hope today reminds you how deeply loved you are.

2026-06-17.title: Day 3 ✨
2026-06-17.message: One of my favorite memories is our Puri beach time together.

2026-06-18.title: Day 4 💌
2026-06-18.message: Thank you for being my comfort person.

2026-06-19.title: Day 5 🌙
2026-06-19.message: Even from far away, you still feel like home.

2026-06-20.title: Day 6 🌊
2026-06-20.message: I still smile thinking about our beach moments.

2026-06-21.title: Day 7 🫶
2026-06-21.message: I love how we never stay angry for long.
